name: Successful urgent assignment
notes: R1 is available, has sufficient battery and load capacity, and has a valid route.

name: Battery rejection
notes: R2 must be rejected because battery level is below 20 percent.

name: No robot with enough capacity
notes: Order weight is 54 kg; all available robots have lower maximum capacity.

name: Manual review required
notes: Shelf S5 status is unknown and should be paired with a low-confidence prediction.

name: Robot failure and replanning
notes: After R1 fails, R3 is the best remaining valid candidate.
